description_long: This is a fixed-blade knife featuring a straight, single-edged blade with a sharp point and a flat spine. The blade is metallic, likely made of stainless steel, and has a smooth, matte finish. The handle is cylindrical and textured, appearing to be wrapped or molded for enhanced grip, and is colored in a mottled gray-blue pattern. A simple, flat guard separates the blade from the handle, providing basic hand protection. The knife's design is utilitarian, with no visible ornamentation or decorative elements. Its proportions and construction suggest it is suitable for outdoor, utility, or survival use in an urban environment.
description: A straight-edged, fixed-blade knife with a metallic blade and a textured, cylindrical gray-blue handle separated by a simple guard. The design is utilitarian and lacks ornamentation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight blade, the flat guard, and the textured cylindrical handle.
description_view_1: End-on view of the handle, revealing its circular cross-section and textured grip surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the blade and handle profile seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Blade tip-on view, showing the narrow blade profile and the rounded end of the handle.
attribute_blade_type: straight, single-edged, flat spine, pointed tip
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, textured, mottled gray-blue, likely polymer or wrapped, ergonomic grip
